articles.title: Jayson Tatum also makes a return in his comeback from Achilles tear
articles.description:
Tatum served up a sophisticated layering of Parisian luxury, 90s nostalgia, street swagger, and fire footwear in the tunnel prior to Friday's game.

The post Jayson Tatum also makes a return in his comeback from Achilles tear appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Jayson Tatum returned to play after recovering from an Achilles tear.
Tatum showcased a unique fashion style before the game on March 7.
His return boosts the Celtics' chances in the upcoming playoff race.

articles.title: Videos show US citizen’s shooting death in Texas last year by federal immigration agent
articles.description:
Th death was the earliest of at least six fatal shootings by federal agents since President Donald Trump launched a nationwide immigration crackdown.

The post Videos show US citizen’s shooting death in Texas last year by federal immigration agent appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: US citizen shot by federal immigration agent in Texas last year, raising concerns over enforcement practices.
This incident is part of at least six fatal shootings by federal agents since Trump's immigration crackdown.
Boston residents may face increased scrutiny and fear regarding immigration enforcement in their communities.

articles.title: Trump will join grieving families for the return of soldiers killed in Iran war
articles.description:
The six members of the Army Reserve, who were killed by a drone strike at a command center in Kuwait, were all from the 103rd Sustainment Command based in Des Moines, Iowa.

The post Trump will join grieving families for the return of soldiers killed in Iran war appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Trump will attend a memorial for six soldiers killed in a drone strike in Kuwait.
The soldiers were part of the 103rd Sustainment Command, based in Des Moines, Iowa.
The event highlights the ongoing impact of military actions on families in Boston.

articles.title: The Latest: Trump says he’ll hit Iran harder as Iranian president apologizes to neighbors
articles.description:
Iranian president apologizes to Gulf neighbors after attacks.

summary: Iranian president apologizes to Gulf neighbors following recent attacks on March 7.

articles.title: She survived a brain tumor. Now she’s running the Boston Marathon.
articles.description:
"This is my chance to honor my journey, inspire others, and make a difference for a cause that aligns with my story."

The post She survived a brain tumor. Now she’s running the Boston Marathon. appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Tracy Haisley, a brain tumor survivor, will run the Boston Marathon on April 17, 2023.
Haisley aims to inspire others and raise awareness for brain tumor research.
Her participation highlights the resilience of Boston residents facing health challenges.
